# License — patterns-hero

## Upstream

- Author: Steve Schoger (https://www.steveschoger.com)
- Site: https://heropatterns.com
- License: CC BY 4.0 (Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International)
- Permits: commercial use, modification, redistribution, provided attribution is given.

## Acquisition note

Patterns were recreated 1:1 from the public CSS / SVG pattern definitions published on heropatterns.com. No scraping of paywalled material. The CC BY 4.0 license on the upstream patterns covers recreation and reuse.

## Use in Clawmachine

Permitted under CC BY 4.0. Attribution obligation: when a pattern derived from heropatterns.com is used in a shipped Clawmachine surface, include credit "Patterns from heropatterns.com (Steve Schoger, CC BY 4.0)" in the product credits / acknowledgements panel.

Current internal-prototype stage: attribution pending until first shipped build; no external distribution of the SVG files themselves.
